examples: Nearer the rough grass, with its long, brownish stalks all agleam, was full of light.
This here's a new bit, and he touched a shoot which looked brownish green instead of hard, dry gray.
You can't see in this light, but my new coat is a sort of brownish colour.
David Ewalt, who diagnosed the brownish juice as tending toward hickory, spices and woodsmoke, called it interesting.
It was just four feet long, but strong, with a brown body, white belly and baleful, brownish-yellow eyes.
